name: Zhiming
bio:
Enlightened Monk proficient in Buddhist Dharma and control powers. Using prayer beads as weapons, he uses the power of Dharma to uphold justice and balance, bringing peace to the world.

Role: Magical Control
Specialty: A mid-backline Control-type hero with powerful Seal Control; can break Seals to deal extra damage.

skillSlots.name: Seal of Reincarnation
skillSlots.description: Attacks backline single target for 173% M.DMG with 100% probability to apply [Sigil].

skillSlots.name: Golden Bell Shield
skillSlots.description: Applies [Golden Bell Shield] to self and highest-ATK Ally, increasing their DEF by 15% for 2 turns, with 30% probability to [Sigil] target when attacking.
